item.title: Beyond the Silos: Why You Should Try a Tiling Window Manager
item.description:
Welcome to the very first post on my multi-disciplinary journey! This blog is a space where I love to connect dots across different fields, but today, we are starting with something foundational to how we interact with technology every single day: how we organize our digital workspace.

If you have ever felt overwhelmed by a chaotic screen full of overlapping apps, or spent way too much time dragging, resizing, and minimizing windows just to see two apps at once, this guide is for you. Let’s dive into the world of Window Managers and see how automation can give you your time back.

item.title: Readme
item.description:
About Me

I am a Civil Engineer with a multi-disciplinary approach to problem-solving. This website serves as a hub for my passion projects, where I explore the intersections of traditional infrastructure design, data science, and advanced spatial technologies.

My core areas of focus include:

  • 🏗️ Civil Engineering & Design: Structural engineering, building analysis, and interior design.
  • 📍 Geospatial Analytics: Spatial data exploration, geographic correlation, and advanced statistical analysis.
  • 🛰️ Remote Sensing & Earth Observation: Machine learning and deep learning (ML/DL) implementations, automated object detection, and multi-layer raster analysis.
  • 📊 Data Science & Exploration: Detailed Exploratory Data Analysis (EDA) and data-driven insights.
  • ✍️ Technical Documentation: Web blogging, academic article writing, and professional engineering reports.
  • ⚙️ System Configuration: Visual and functional optimization for both Linux and Windows environments.

🎓 Education

  • 🎓 Master of Science in GIS for Environment and Development (MSGED)
